I heard an audible gasp in the audience, just as a gynaecologist on the movie screen tries to shove a speculum – a hollow cylinder used to open up a woman’s cervix – into the lower body of the protagonist.

news.headline: Growing discontent as 36 Democrats back Bernie Sanders’ bid to block arms sales to Israel
news.summary: More than three dozen Democrats backed a bid by Senator Bernie Sanders on Wednesday to block US arms sales to Israel, reflecting growing unease over Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and conflicts in Gaza and Iran. news.headline: BBC to slash 2,000 jobs in biggest redundancy drive in 15 years
news.summary:
The BBC said on Wednesday that the British broadcasting corporation is set to cut up to 2,000 jobs amid a challenging media landscape.

news.headline: Brazil’s fugitive ex-spy chief freed in the US after ICE detention
news.summary: Alexandre Ramagem, who fled Brazil following his conviction for plotting a coup, was held by ICE in Florida on Monday.

news.headline: Sudan Enters Fourth Year of War Amid World’s Most Severe Humanitarian Crisis
news.summary: Fighting that erupted in 2023 has forced millions from their homes and left widespread hunger that is now being compounded by strife in the Middle East.

news.headline: Why China jobseekers use dating apps for work, recruitment sites for matchmaking
news.summary:
Chinese jobseekers are now turning to dating apps to search for work, while some recruitment platforms have become places to connect for dates instead.

news.summary:
